scripts.dev: pnpm --filter anypost-relay build && pnpm --filter anypost-core build && pnpm run build:main && concurrently -k "pnpm --filter anypost-core build --watch" "pnpm --filter anypost-web exec vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "wait-on tcp:5173 && ANYPOST_WEB_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ./dist/main/main.js"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter anypost-web build && pnpm --filter anypost-relay build && pnpm --filter anypost-core build && pnpm run build:main && node ./scripts/copy-web-dist.mjs
